numbers.usage: Use for all financial figures, invoice numbers, amounts, and GST totals.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_system: Use generous but structured spacing. Implement bento grid (CONTROL ROOM MODE) for the dashboard. Use gap-4 or gap-6 for tight widget spacing.
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid borders (border-border) with subtle or no shadow to maintain a flat, crisp 'tech' look. Avoid heavy box shadows.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-lg for outer cards, rounded-md for inner elements like buttons and inputs.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow. Add p-6 inside card containers.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-blue-700 text-white. Sharp corners (rounded-md max) to match the Swiss aesthetic.
components.inputs: Use Shadcn UI standard inputs, select, and date pickers. No native HTML inputs.
components.tables: Dense, crisp tables. Use 1px bottom border on rows. Numbers must be right-aligned and use monospace font.
components.navigation: Sidebar navigation for modules (Authentication, Party, Product, Sales, Purchase, Payments, GST, Accounting, TDS, Settings). Dark mode toggle in header/sidebar.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicitly set text color on hover. Button hover state must be lighter/darker hue of active state.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use skeleton loaders for tables and dashboard metric cards. Do not use generic spinners.

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='sales-invoice-submit-button').

specific_requirements.currency_format: Indian Rupee (₹) with lakhs/crores formatting (locale: en-IN).
specific_requirements.icons: lucide-react for sharp, clean interface icons.
specific_requirements.charts: Recharts for the sales chart. Use minimalist axes and tooltips.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Import Outfit, Plus Jakarta Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.css. 2. Configure Tailwind with these fonts. 3. Follow the specified design guidelines rigorously. Apply Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) aesthetic. Use Outfit for headings, Plus Jakarta Sans for body, and JetBrains Mono for all numeric financial data. 4. Ensure the dashboard utilizes progressive disclosure and a structured bento grid layout. 5. Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements. 6. Build the BillEasy Indian business billing/accounting full-stack dashboard.
